case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. MARIANNE ATWAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ATWAN, MARIANNE DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-07-2021
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ATWAN, MARIANNE $11,400.73 PRINCIPAL, $760.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,160.73, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200024871), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC SERVED FEB-06-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE FEB-08-2021 AS TO DEFENDANT ATWAN, MARIANNE
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 200047518) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ATWAN, MARIANNE
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200035776) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT ATWAN, MARIANNE
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $166.50 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 200046532) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION RE DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS ON STIPULATED AGREEMENT AND REQUEST FOR ENTER JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200035776) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
